---
title: "quartobot — minimal example"
author: Your Name
date: today
---

# What this renders

One `@doi:` citation resolved automatically, and one hand-curated entry
from `references.bib`. That's it — no CI, no banner, no template
machinery. The minimum to verify the pre-render hook is wired up
correctly.

The manubot pattern is described in @doi:10.1371/journal.pcbi.1007128.
The Quarto publishing stack is documented in [@quarto2024].

# What to look for

After `quarto render`:

- `references.json` exists at the project root with one CSL JSON entry
  for the resolved DOI, keyed by the user's prose form
  (`doi:10.1371/journal.pcbi.1007128`).
- Both citations appear in the bibliography below, correctly formatted.

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
